_title: PocketMiner cryptic-pocket prediction on the apo NR4A3 LBD (independent cross-check)

_input.circularity_guard: apo pre-metadynamics AF2 structure; NOT a metad-opened frame

_honest_caveats: Independent positive: Pocket-5 mean 0.64 vs LBD background 0.47 (1.36x); 8/10 pocket residues >=0.5, 4/10 >=0.7; 8/10 in the top ~14-29% of the LBD by cryptic-pocket score (percentile 0.71-0.89).

The absolute top-15 residues (375-398) sit at the N-terminal truncation edge of the 373-626 fragment — a chain-terminus/flexibility artifact of scoring a domain fragment, NOT the functional pocket; reported for transparency.

PocketMiner is a single-static-structure PREDICTOR of cryptic-pocket PROPENSITY. It corroborates the SITE/existence of a cryptic pocket at Pocket-5 from an independent method + training set; it does NOT provide opened geometry, druggability, or replace the metadynamics+fpocket evidence.
